quote: I typed APPLE and the game gave me five green tiles. I have never felt more seen by software. I am considering naming my next pet @@DISPLAY_NAME@@.
author: Jordan M., Austin

quote: I have been playing for six hours and I am starting to suspect the game is just agreeing with me. I cannot decide if this is brilliant or meaningless. I have scheduled a call with my therapist.
author: Priya K., Portland

quote: I typed HORSE and the tiles turned grey except the H, which was green. I have no idea what this means but I feel it meant something.
author: Doug, LinkedIn
